spaceflight.title: Mauritius becomes 70th nation to sign the Artemis Accords
spaceflight.summary:
The island nation of Mauritius signed the Artemis Accords July 17, becoming the 70th nation to do so in less than six years.

spaceflight.summary:
The maximum value of the National Security Space Launch Phase 3 Lane 1 contract was raised from $5.6 billion to $17 billion

spaceflight.title: Skyroot Aerospace reaches orbit on first Vikram-1 launch
spaceflight.summary:
Skyroot Aerospace’s Vikram-1 rocket successfully lifted off on its inaugural flight July 18, becoming the first commercial Indian rocket to reach orbit.

spaceflight.title: NASA terminates Draper lunar lander mission
spaceflight.summary:
NASA and Draper have terminated plans for a lunar lander mission after significant delays in development of the spacecraft.
